description: Indulge in classic Beef Stroganoff, featuring tender steak pieces coated in flour and browned, then simmered with onions, mushrooms, and a rich sauce. Finishing with a swirl of sour cream, this dish is a comforting and elegant meal.
instructions:
1. Dip meat in flour.
2. In heavy skillet, brown meat in hot fat. Add onion, garlic and mushrooms (include liquid).
3. Combine all other ingredients except sour cream and pour over meat mixture. Cover and simmer for about 1 hour.
4. Stir occasionally.
5. Add a little water if too much liquid evaporates.
6. Stir in sour cream. Heat but do not boil.
7. Serve over rice or noodles.

title: German Pork And Bean Bake
description: A hearty German-style bake combining succulent pork with tangy sauerkraut, sweet applesauce, and savory wieners. This comforting dish is perfect for a satisfying family meal, blending sweet and sour flavors.
instructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°.
2. Combine all ingredients except wieners in a greased 2 1/2-quart casserole.
3. Bake 25 minutes. Place wieners on top of bean mixture and bake an additional 20 minutes.

title: Mexican Tortilla Rolls
description: These zesty Mexican tortilla rolls are filled with a creamy blend of cream cheese, green onions, and chili, then rolled and chilled for a delightful appetizer. Perfect for parties, they are quick to prepare and burst with flavor.
instructions:
1. Mix the first six ingredients and spread thinly onto tortillas.
2. Roll tortillas, then roll tortillas in damp paper towels.
3. Place in a large sandwich bag and seal tightly.
4. Keep refrigerated until ready to serve.

title: Beef And Sausage Hors D'Oeuvre
description: Whip up these savory Beef and Sausage Hors D'Oeuvres, combining flavorful ground meats with hearty cheese and a blend of spices. These quick bites are perfect for entertaining guests or as a tasty snack.
instructions: 1. You will need aluminum foil and a cookie sheet.

title: Artichoke And Mushroom Salad
description: Enjoy a simple yet elegant artichoke and mushroom salad, marinated overnight in flavorful Italian dressing for enhanced taste. Perfect as an appetizer or a light side dish, this recipe requires minimal effort for maximum flavor.
instructions: 1. Slice artichokes and mushrooms according to preference. Marinate overnight in Italian dressing. Serves 2 to 4. Don't know if can freeze. Must do ahead.

title: Red Hot Lover'S Chili
description: Spice up your meal with this hearty Red Hot Lover's Chili, featuring ground beef, onions, and beans simmered in a rich tomato sauce with plenty of chili seasoning. This flavorful dish is perfect for a comforting and satisfying meal.
instructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook the meat, pepper and onion until the meat is browned.
2. Drain. Add remaining ingredients.
3. Bring to a boil, stirring frequently.
4. Reduce heat.
5. Simmer 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Serve with tortilla chips and shredded Cheddar cheese.
6. Makes 6 servings.

title: Cheesy Chilada Casserole
description: Indulge in this Cheesy Chilada Casserole, layered with seasoned ground beef and beans, flavorful tomato sauce, and plenty of cheese. Served with fresh toppings, it’s a comforting and satisfying meal for any occasion.
instructions:
1. Brown meat with green pepper, onion and garlic in 10-inch skillet; drain.
2. Add beans, tomato sauce, picante, cumin and salt; simmer 15 minutes.
3. Spoon small amount of meat mixture into a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish, spreading to coat bottom of dish.
4. Top with 6 tortillas, overlapping to cover bottom of dish.
5. Top with half the remaining meat mixture; sprinkle with one cup of cheese. Cover with remaining tortillas, overlapping to cover cheese; top with remaining meat mixture.
6. Cover tightly with foil; bake at 350° for 20 minutes.

title: Creole Chicken And Mushroom Salad
description: Savor this vibrant Creole Chicken and Mushroom Salad, featuring tender chicken, fresh vegetables, and earthy mushrooms. Drizzled with a zesty lemon-vinegar dressing, it's a refreshing and flavorful dish perfect for a light meal.
instructions:
1. Line a bowl with lettuce.
2. Toss the first 6 ingredients together and place in the lettuce-lined bowl.
3. Mix the last 6 ingredients well.
4. Pour over the salad and toss lightly.

title: Baked Blintzes
description: Enjoy these delightful baked blintzes, generously coated in a creamy mixture of sugar, vanilla, and sour cream, then sprinkled with cinnamon and baked to golden perfection. This sweet dish is perfect for breakfast, brunch, or dessert.
instructions:
1. Melt enough margarine to coat rectangular Pyrex baking dish (8 x 11-inch).
2. Place frozen blintzes in dish in one layer.
3. Mix remaining ingredients and pour over blintzes.
4. Sprinkle cinnamon on top.
5. Bake one hour at 375° until puffy and golden brown.
6. Can serve hot or at room temperature.

title: Wesleyan Rice
description: A delightful Wesleyan Rice dish, featuring long-grain rice baked with savory onion soup, rich consommé, and earthy mushrooms. This simple yet flavorful side dish is perfect for complementing any meal.
instructions:
1. Melt butter in casserole dish.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients. Bake 45 minutes at 375°, uncovered.

title: Broiled Sirloin And Mushroom Salad
description: Savor this elegant Broiled Sirloin and Mushroom Salad, featuring tender sirloin strips and earthy mushrooms served over fresh salad greens with cherry tomatoes. Drizzled with a rich red wine vinaigrette, it's a sophisticated and flavorful dish.
instructions:
1. Slash edge of fat on meat to keep from curling; grill meat about 13 minutes on each side.
2. Cool meat and cut into 3/8-inch strips.
3. Arrange in ungreased rectangular baking dish, 13 x 9 x 2. Place mushrooms on beef; top with pepper strips.
4. Mix remaining ingredients except salad greens and tomatoes; pour over beef and vegetables.
5. Cover and refrigerate at least 3 hours, spooning marinade over vegetables occasionally.
6. Remove beef and vegetables with slotted spoon onto salad greens.
7. Garnish with tomatoes.

title: Flat Armenian (Russia) Bread With Sesame Seed(Churek)
description: Enjoy traditional Flat Armenian Bread, also known as Churek, made with a blend of yeast, flour, and butter, and topped with a sprinkle of white sesame seeds. This flavorful bread is perfect for complementing any meal.
instructions:
1. Sprinkle the yeast and 1 teaspoon of the sugar into 1/2 cup of lukewarm (110-115F) water in a small, shallow bowl.
2. Let stand for 2 or 3 minutes, then stir to dissolve the yeast completely. Set the bowl aside in a warm, draft-free spot (such as an unlighted oven) for about 5 to 10 minutes, or until the mixture almost doubles in volume.

title: Polish Kolachky
description: Delight in traditional Polish Kolachky, buttery and tender pastries filled with delicious fruit filling. These delicate cookies, made with a sour cream dough, are a perfect treat for any occasion.
instructions:
1. Cut butter in flour as for pastry.
2. Crumble yeast in sour cream.
3. Add egg yolks and mix well.
4. Add yeast mixture to flour mixture and mix well.
5. Chill 2-3 hours in refrigerator.
6. Roll out dough on a board covered with powdered sugar.
7. Cut into 3 inch squares and fill with fruit filling.
8. Lap opposite corners to center.
9. Bake at 350 degrees until brown.
10. Add a dash of powdered sugar on top before serving.

title: Nalisniki(Lithuanian Crepes)
description: Savor these delicate Nalisniki, rich Lithuanian crepes made from a simple batter of eggs, flour, and milk. Pan-fried to golden perfection, these thin pancakes are versatile and can be filled with sweet or savory ingredients.
instructions:
1. Mix all ingredients.
2. Batter will be thin. Pour just enough batter into a
3. heated, buttered skillet to cover the bottom.
4. Turn when edges of crepe pull away from the pan and it bubbles up. After crepe is cooked on both sides, remove from skillet.

title: Flour Tortilla Pizza
description: Transform a simple flour tortilla into a quick and delicious pizza with seasoned ground beef, rich tomato sauce, and a generous topping of melted Cheddar and Mozzarella cheeses. This easy recipe is perfect for a fast weeknight meal.
instructions:
1. Brown meat and onion together.
2. Salt to taste until cooked. Lay flour tortilla flat open on cookie sheet; spread tomato sauce. Add 4 tablespoons meat, spread over sauce, then sprinkle both type of cheeses over meat and place in oven at 350° for about 5 to 10 minutes for cheese to melt, then serve.

title: Sweet Pickled Banana Peppers
description: Enjoy homemade Sweet Pickled Banana Peppers, soaked in ice water and then submerged in a vibrant syrup of vinegar, sugar, water, and spices. These tangy and sweet peppers are perfect for adding a kick to sandwiches or salads.
instructions:
1. Cut peppers in half.
2. Remove seeds and soak in ice water for 3 hours, then drain.
3. Make a syrup of the ingredients listed and bring to a boil.
4. Pour boiling syrup over peppers that have been packed into clean sterilized jars.
5. Seal at once.

title: Beer And Kraut Fudge Cake
description: A delicious beer and kraut fudge cake recipe.
instructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in eggs, one at a time and add vanilla and beat.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients and add to the creamed mixture, alternating with beer and beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
4. Stir in the sauerkraut.
5. Turn into two greased and floured layer cake pans. Bake in 350° oven for about 35 minutes or until cake tests done. Cool on rack and frost with chocolate frosting.

title: Hot Cheese Chowder
description: A delicious hot cheese chowder recipe.
instructions:
1. Saute celery, onion and green pepper in butter in Dutch oven until tender.
2. Add chicken broth, potato and carrot; bring to a boil.
3. Cover, reduce heat and simmer 20 minutes or until vegetables are tender.

title: Busy Day Goulash Skillet
description: A delicious busy day goulash skillet recipe.
instructions:
1. Place the first 6 ingredients in a large skillet. Cook until beef is brown and vegetables are tender. Drain off excess fat. Add remaining ingredients, except
2. macaroni and cook on low heat for 20 minutes. Add macaroni and cook 10 minutes longer.
3. If desired, serve with grated cheese and a dollop of sour cream. Serves 4 to 6.

title: Phil'S Easy Burritos
description: A delicious phil's easy burritos recipe.
instructions:
1. Brown ground beef; add onion and cook until onion is tender. Drain; add remaining ingredients except tortillas and heat until cheese is melted.
2. Fill tortilla shells; roll up and warm in microwave.
3. Serve with shredded lettuce, chopped tomatoes, sour cream and salsa or picante sauce.

title: Dutch Potato Pancakes
description: A delicious dutch potato pancakes recipe.
instructions:
1. Combine ingredients.
2. Drop by heaping tablespoonfuls on a greased grill or large frying pan. Brown well on both sides.

title: Crispy Potato Pancakes (Latkes)
description: A delicious crispy potato pancakes (latkes) recipe.
instructions: 1. Using a box grater or food processor, coarsely grate potatoes and onions. Put grated potatoes and onions together in cheesecloth or a tea towel and twist it to squeeze out the excess liquid. Put the dry potatoes and onions in a bowl and season with salt and pepper. Fold in the egg whites and chives to bind the mixture together. Heat a large non-stick skillet over medium heat and coat with 1/4 inch of oil. For each pancake, take about 2 Tbsp. of potato mixture and drop into the hot oil; gently flatten with a spatula so they fry up thin and crispy. Fry for 3 to 4 minutes on each side, until golden. Remove to paper towels to drain; season with salt while the potato pancakes are still hot. Continue frying, adding more oil as needed, until all the mixture is used up. Serve immediately with applesauce, if desired.

title: Beef Stroganoff
description: A delicious beef stroganoff recipe.
instructions:
1. Melt shortening in skillet.
2. Cook beef and onion.
3. Drain off fat.
4. Stir in tomatoes and tomato sauce, adding salt, sugar and garlic (if desired).
5. Simmer 10 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, cook noodles; drain well.
7. While hot, using a fork, blend in sour cream and cream cheese (which you have cut into cubes).

title: Mom Olson'S Russian Salad Dressing
description: A delicious mom olson's russian salad dressing recipe.
instructions:
1. Buzz all ingredients in a blender or mix well with a wire whisk.
2. Keep refrigerated and shake well before using.
3. Makes 1 pint.

title: Brunsli(Christmas Cookies)
description: A delicious brunsli(christmas cookies) recipe.
instructions:
1. Put almonds in bowl.
2. Sieve in the powdered sugar.
3. Stir in cocoa, cinnamon, vanilla and Kirsch.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff. Fold egg whites into almond mixture until firm.
5. Wrap the dough in Saran Wrap and put it into the fridge for 1 hour.
6. Spread sugar onto a board.
7. Roll dough flat (1cm/0.4-inches).
8. Cut out stars (4cm/1.6-inches).
9. Lay them on a tray that has been lined with paper.
10. Leave for 4 hours.

title: Baked Fish Chowder
description: A delicious baked fish chowder recipe.
instructions:
1. Use fresh or frozen fish (if frozen, put in that way, but stir chowder when partly cooked).
2. Put all ingredients except cream, in a very large casserole or 2 casseroles, 2 1/2-quart capacity. Cover and bake at 375° for 1 hour.
3. Heat cream to scalding before serving and add to chowder.
4. Makes 8 to 10 servings, 1 bowl each.

title: Sauerkraut Balls
description: A delicious sauerkraut balls recipe.
instructions:
1. Squeeze sauerkraut dry.
2. Combine all ingredients.
3. Mix well. Shape into one-inch balls.
4. Bake in ungreased shallow pan at 375° for 35 to 40 minutes.
5. Break open to test.
6. Serves 5.

title: Mini-Reubens(Hors D'Oeuvre)
description: A delicious mini-reubens(hors d'oeuvre) recipe.
instructions:
1. Mix well and bake at 350° for 1/2 hour.
2. Reheats well in microwave.
3. Serve on party rye.

title: Mimosa Salad
description: A delicious mimosa salad recipe.
instructions:
1. Combine all the vegetables and mix in 4 tablespoons mayonnaise, some salt and pepper and as much nutmeg as your palate desires.
2. More mayonnaise may be added to achieve a creamier texture.
3. Chill and serve on a lettuce bed with chopped hard-boiled egg.
4. Serves 2 to 4.

title: Biscuit Goulash
description: A delicious biscuit goulash recipe.
instructions:
1. Brown hamburger meat with onion, bell pepper and a little garlic.
2. Add Ro-Tel tomatoes, tomato sauce and cream of mushroom soup.
3. Heat on top of stove Cheez Whiz and sour cream, then mix well with hamburger mixture.

title: Stroganoff, Italian Style
description: A delicious stroganoff, italian style recipe.
instructions:
1. Cook hamburger and onion.
2. Drain and add sour cream and dry stroganoff mix.
3. While this is simmering, slice French bread lengthwise and butter it.
4. Place on cookie sheet.
5. Place hamburger mixture on buttered bread.
6. Top with cheese and bake in 400° oven until cheese melts.

title: Knockwurst And Sauerkraut
description: A delicious knockwurst and sauerkraut recipe.
instructions:
1. In large frying pan, add oil.
2. Saute onions until translucent. Add the catsup, water, brown sugar and mustard.
3. Simmer 5 minutes.

title: Ham And Pierogi Lasagna
description: A delicious ham and pierogi lasagna recipe.
instructions:
1. Peel, cube, boil and mash potatoes.
2. Cube ham and add to potatoes.
3. Mix in half of grated Cheddar cheese.
4. Mix in milk, butter, salt and pepper.
5. Saute onions.
6. Prepare lasagna noodles. In 9 x 13-inch pan, layer potato and ham mix, onions and lasagna (in that order) until you get to the top and cover with lasagna noodles.
7. Sprinkle with remaining grated Cheddar cheese.
8. Bake at 325° for 35 minutes.

title: Helen'S Portuguese Stew
description: A delicious helen's portuguese stew recipe.
instructions: 1. Slice sausage 1/4-inch thick slices. Brown in 12 or 14-inch skillet on medium heat. Brown both sides of slices approximately 10 to 12 minutes. Mince garlic and stir thoroughly into skillet as sausage browns. Slice pepper into 1/4 x 2-inch slices. Dice onion. When sausage is browned, add pepper and onion. Continue medium heat and stirring, cook 5 minutes. Add kidney beans, tomato sauce, stewed tomatoes and chili powder. Stir thoroughly and continuously approximately 5 minutes. Add and stir in water; reduce heat and let cook down, uncovered, for 10 to 15 minutes, stirring occasionally. Result should be a nice thick dark brown sauce with sausage, peppers, onions and tomatoes visible. This is a fun one pan easy quick meal that can be adjusted to taste and will fill the kitchen with a wonderful fragrance. Serve with buttered hard rolls and a green salad or for a real treat with buttered sun-dried tomato bread.

title: Chicken And Spinach Enchiladas(Mexican Meal)
description: A delicious chicken and spinach enchiladas(mexican meal) recipe.
instructions:
1. Boil chicken 40 minutes or until tender.
2. Remove chicken and let cool slightly. Bone chicken, dice and set aside.
3. Cook spinach according to package directions and drain well. Reserve 1 cup spinach broth. Set aside.
4. Saute onion in butter until tender. Stir in spinach and chicken. Set aside.
5. Combine soup, reserved spinach broth, milk, green chiles, sour cream and half of the cheese in a bowl.
6. Mix well. Stir half of the sauce mixture into chicken mixture.
7. Reserve remaining sauce.
8. Spoon chicken mixture evenly down center of each tortilla.
9. Roll up tortillas and place, seam down, into 2 lightly greased pans. Bake, uncovered, at 350° for 25 minutes. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
10. Bake an additional 5 minutes.
11. Serves 16; you may halve the recipe, if you want.

title: Apple Latkes(Pancakes)
description: A delicious apple latkes(pancakes) recipe.
instructions:
1. Mix ingredients in order given.
2. Drop by tablespoon into deep hot fat and fry until golden brown.
3. Drain on paper and sprinkle with cinnamon and sugar.

title: Potato Latkes
description: These simple potato latkes are a traditional dish, featuring grated potatoes and onion bound with flour and egg, then fried until golden brown. Serve them hot as a delicious side or appetizer.
instructions:
1. Grate potatoes and onion.
2. Mix in flour and pinch of salt. Blend together.
3. Beat eggs into mixture.
4. Let stand about 5 minutes.
5. Drop tablespoons of batter into 1/8-inch of hot fat or oil.
6. In a large skillet.
7. Brown on both sides.

title: Reuben Pie
description: A savory pie taking inspiration from the classic Reuben sandwich, this dish combines rye bread, Swiss cheese, corned beef, and sauerkraut, all baked with an egg and milk mixture until firm and delicious.
instructions:
1. Press bread into greased pie pan.
2. Spread mustard over bread. Place cheese, corned beef and sauerkraut on top.
3. Pour egg mixture over pie.
4. Bake in preheated 325° oven for 40 minutes.

title: 3 Vegetable Latkes
description: These vegetable latkes offer a delightful blend of potatoes, carrots, zucchini, and onion, seasoned with parsley, salt, and pepper. Bound with matzo meal and eggs, they are shaped into cakes and pan-fried.
instructions:
1. In a bowl, combine eggs, shredded vegetables, parsley, salt and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
2. Stir in matzo meal.
3. Shape into flat cakes, using 1 to 2 tablespoons mixture for each.

title: Polish Honey Cookies
description: These delightful Polish honey cookies are made from a rich dough of honey, sugar, eggs, and flour, spiced with cinnamon, nutmeg, and ginger. After chilling, they are rolled out and ready for baking.
instructions: 1. Combine honey and sugar. Add eggs; beat. Sift flour, soda, cinnamon, nutmeg and ginger. Add enough flour to make a stiff dough. Shape into a ball and refrigerate 2 hours. Roll out on a floured board to a 1/4-inch thickness and cut with a round cookie cutter. Brush top of each cookie with egg white and press an almond into the center. Cook on greased cookie sheet for 12 to 15 minutes at 375°.

title: Delicious Potato Pancakes
description: These delicious potato pancakes feature coarsely shredded potatoes and onions, squeezed dry and mixed with eggs, flour, salt, pepper, and a hint of nutmeg. They are then fried to a crispy perfection.
instructions:
1. Coarsely shred potatoes and onions into a large bowl with cold water.
2. In colander, drain.
3. Wrap in towel; squeeze to remove water.
4. In same bowl, beat eggs.
5. Add potatoes, onions, flour, salt, pepper and nutmeg; mix well.
6. Put salad oil in a large skillet over medium heat until hot.
7. Drop mixture by large spoonfuls; flatten with pancake turner.
8. Cook until golden brown, turn over and brown other side.

title: Buttermilk Borsch
description: A refreshing cold borsch made with beets, creamy buttermilk, cottage cheese, and a tang of lemon juice. This quick and easy soup is blended with ice cubes and served in mugs.
instructions:
1. Put 1/2 cup beets and remaining ingredients in blender with 1/2 cup ice cubes and whirl 30 seconds.
2. Serve in mugs topped with a few shoestring beets, if desired.
3. Makes 2 1/2 cups or 2 servings, about 90 calories each (without topping).

title: Hanky Pankys
description: A popular appetizer featuring seasoned ground beef, crumbled and mixed with garlic and Worcestershire sauce, then combined with sausage and melted Velveeta cheese. Served on party rye bread, it's a flavorful bite.
instructions:
1. Brown meat in large skillet; season with garlic salt and Worcestershire sauce.
2. Make sure meat is in a crumbly texture. After meat is cooked, place chunks of cheese on top and cover pan with lid.
3. Simmer on low until the cheese melts and stir mixture thoroughly.
4. Spoon meat mixture on party rye slices and serve warm.

title: Stuffed Cabbage Roll
description: Classic stuffed cabbage rolls filled with a savory mixture of beef, rice, onion, and egg, seasoned with salt and pepper. These rolls are cooked until tender and typically served with a tomato-based sauce.
instructions:
1. Cook cabbage leaves in boiling salted water a few minutes to soften; drain.
2. Combine beef, rice, onion, egg, salt and pepper with 2 tablespoons soup.
3. Divide meat mixture among cabbage leaves.
4. Roll and secure with toothpicks.
5. Place cabbage rolls in skillet and pour remaining soup over them.
6. Cover, cook over low heat about 40 minutes, stirring often, spoon sauce over.
7. Serves 4.

title: Mock Cheese Blintzes
description: These mock cheese blintzes use thin, rolled-out bread slices instead of crepes, filled with a sweet cream cheese, sugar, and egg yolk mixture. They are gently rolled up and typically fried until golden.
instructions:
1. Cut crusts off bread.
2. With rolling pin, roll out very thin. Whip with mixer cream cheese, 1/2 cup sugar and egg yolks until smooth.
3. Spread cream cheese mixture on bread.
4. Gently roll up like a jelly roll.
5. Melt butter.
6. Mix 1 cup sugar, cinnamon and nutmeg together in small mixing bowl.
7. Dip rolled breads into melted butter.
8. Roll in cinnamon mixture.
9. Place in 9 x 13-inch glass dish.
10. Place in freezer for at least 4 hours.
11. Take out of freezer 1/2 hour before baking.
12. Bake at 400° for 25 minutes.

title: Fresh Broccoli And Mushroom Salad
description: A simple and refreshing salad combining fresh broccoli florets, sliced mushrooms, onion, and water chestnuts. It's tossed in a dressing and left to marinate overnight, allowing flavors to meld.
instructions:
1. Make dressing according to package.
2. Pour over vegetables and let set overnight.

title: Carrot Halva
description: A sweet and rich dessert, this carrot halva is made by cooking grated carrots with brown sugar, condensed milk, and water until thick. Butter, raisins, and grated coconut are then added for extra flavor and texture.
instructions:
1. Mix carrots, sugar, milk and water in heavy pan.
2. Boil until almost dry, stirring constantly.
3. Add butter and cook again until almost dry.
4. Add raisins and coconut. Spread in a shallow greased pan and refrigerate.
5. Cut into squares when cold.

title: Easy Red Beet Soup
description: This easy red beet soup is a comforting and flavorful dish, made by simmering beets, onion, carrots, celery, and tomatoes with beef bouillon. It's a nourishing and simple meal.
instructions: 1. Combine all ingredients in a 4-quart pot and simmer for 1 hour.

title: Lite Pistachio Salad
description: A quick and light dessert or side dish, combining instant pistachio pudding with crushed pineapple and mini marshmallows. This easy salad requires no cooking and is simply refrigerated before serving.
instructions:
1. Mix Cool Whip and dry instant pudding; add pineapple and marshmallows.
2. Refrigerate.

title: Boxty(Irish Potato Pancakes)
description: Boxty, an Irish potato pancake, features a blend of raw grated potatoes, eggs, flour, and seasonings. The potatoes are squeezed to remove excess moisture, then mixed with onion and milk, and fried until crispy.
instructions:
1. Peel the raw potatoes and coarsely grate them onto a clean cloth.
2. Wring the cloth to extract as much moisture from the potatoes as possible.
3. Put the grated potato in a large mixing bowl.
4. Add the mashed potatoes and beat in the eggs with a wooden spoon.

title: Bacon And Chive Potato Pancakes
description: These savory potato pancakes are enhanced with crispy bacon and fresh chives, adding a delightful depth of flavor. Grated potato is pressed to remove moisture, then mixed and fried, often served with sour cream.
instructions: 1. Peel the potato, grate it coarse and press it between several thicknesses of paper towel to remove any excess moisture.

title: Grandma'S Original Homemade Potato Pancakes
description: Grandma's homemade potato pancakes are a classic, featuring grated potatoes mixed with egg, salt, pepper, and cinnamon, bound with corn flake crumbs. Fried until golden, they are often served with applesauce.
instructions:
1. Pour oil 3/4 inch in deep frying pan.
2. Grate potatoes in wooden bowl.
3. Add salt, pepper, egg and cinnamon.
4. Mix all ingredients, except corn flakes and applesauce.
5. Add corn flake crumbs, a little at a time, until slightly firm.
6. Make sure oil is good and hot.
7. Spoon batter in oil.
8. Keep turning until golden brown.
9. Serve with applesauce and sprinkle with sugar.

title: Tortilla Roll Ups
description: These easy tortilla roll-ups are filled with a creamy mixture of cream cheese, beef, green onions, and garlic salt. Spread onto soft tortillas, they are rolled up and chilled, perfect for a party snack.
instructions:
1. Mix cream cheese, beef, onions, garlic and salt.
2. Spread onto soft tortillas and roll up, placing into large ziploc bag or Tupperware container with lid.
3. Refrigerate overnight or for at least 3 hours.
4. Slice into 1/2 inch to 3/4 inch pieces just before serving with Picante sauce.

title: Scuffletown Kraut Salad
description: A tangy and refreshing salad featuring sauerkraut combined with crisp celery, carrots, green onions, pimento, and green pepper. Dressed in a simple vinegar and sugar mixture, it's best when marinated for several hours.
instructions:
1. Early in the day, combine kraut with all the other ingredients.
2. Cover and refrigerate at least 4 hours.
3. Great for days!

title: Cheesy Chicken Fajitas
description: Flavorful cheesy chicken fajitas are prepared by cooking peppers, onions, and chicken until tender, seasoned with green chilies, cumin, and garlic. Served with warm flour tortillas, cheese, and salsa, it's a vibrant meal.
instructions:
1. Spray a large skillet with no-stick cooking spray.
2. Add pepper and onion.
3. Cook and stir until tender.
4. Remove from skillet. Spray skillet with no-stick cooking spray.
5. Add chicken.
6. Cook and stir until cooked through.
7. Add cooked vegetables, chilies, cumin and garlic; simmer 5 minutes.
8. Place each tortilla on microwavable plate.
9. Top with 2 cheese slices.
10. Microwave each tortilla on High 20 seconds.
11. Top each tortilla with half of chicken mixture.
12. Fold sides to middle.
13. Serve with salsa.
14. Makes 2 servings.

title: Grandma'S Chicken Fricassee
description: This comforting chicken fricassee is a unique blend of ingredients, combining chopped meat, egg, and bread crumbs with potatoes, ham, and a creamy chicken soup base. It creates a hearty and flavorful stew.
instructions:
1. Paula and I collaborated on this recipe, and it was fun.
2. This dish is quite different from my usual fare, but my wonderful wife said it is popular in mill towns.
3. I'll list it under vegetables, but it could be used as a main dish.
4. Try it, I think you will be quite pleased.
